Whether you are dropping in for a quick glass or making an afternoon of it, Sunday at Sandhill is the perfect […]</p>\n

events.title: Ari Neufeld
events.address: 4629 Lakeshore Road, Kelowna, Kelowna, British Columbia
events.description: Ari Neufeld is a one-man band, redefining what it means to make music. This Canadian singer-songwriter turns his entire body into an instrument: guitar in hand, feet stomping out rhythm and knees keeping time with percussive tools. Stop by this Sunday afternoon and check it out.

events.title: Tanya Lipscomb
events.description: <p>Tanya Lipscomb is a highly versatile Canadian singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist known for a genre-bending, eclectic style that blends folk, roots, soul, jazz, blues, and world beats. She is recognized for her loop pedal performances featuring "soulful, funky" sounds, conscientious lyrics, and 3-octave vocals, often described as a "genre-jumping" artist</p>\n

events.title: Floor Opener
events.description: Lawrence Paul Yuxweluptun is one of Canada’s most outspoken and influential contemporary artists, confronting colonial suppression, environmental degradation, and the ongoing struggles for Indigenous sovereignty. Of Cowichan (Hul’q’umi’num Coast Salish) and Okanagan (Syilx) descent, his forty-year practice brings together traditional iconography, fearless critique, and biting satire to challenge and unsettle. events.title: Blossom & Bites: A Spring Lunch for Two
events.description: A Springtime Meadery lunch for TWO! Enjoy the Spring Sunshine on our farm! Start with a Local, Charcuterie Bento Lunch in our Picnic Area or our picturesque outdoor Bistro and a guided wine tasting or flight of our honey wines. Take our self-guided Bee Tour, take the Honeybee Challenge, play lawn games & enjoy farm fun.
